basic_details.job_title: Nalanda University Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Nalanda University Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the Nalanda University Recruitment 2026 for various Non-Teaching Positions including Manager (IT), Assistant Manager (IT), Manager (Guest House), Junior Engineer (Mechanical), Assistant (Finance), and Assistant (Administration) posts.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/B.Tech/MCA/M.Sc. in relevant field, Graduate in relevant discipline, 3-8 years relevant experience
qualification.details: Manager (IT): BE/B.Tech/MCA/M.Sc. with technical major in Computer Engineering/Computer Application/Computer Science/IT or equivalent + 8 years experience in managing large Data Center, Campus-wide Network, data security, enterprise infrastructure, Network Security, mail/web/proxy servers, DNS, DHCP, Open Source with OEM certification. Assistant Manager (IT): BE/B.Tech/MCA/M.Sc. with technical major in Computer Engineering/Computer Application/Computer Science/IT or equivalent + 5 years experience in managing large Data Center, Campus-wide Network, data security, enterprise infrastructure, Network Security, mail/web/proxy servers, DNS, DHCP, Open Source with OEM certification. Manager (Guest House): Graduate in Hotel Management/Hospitality Management/Tourism or equivalent with min 60% marks + Knowledge of spreadsheets, database software, record keeping + Min 5 years experience in supervising front desk/housekeeping/maintenance, check-in/out, visitor records, budget, health/safety protocols. Junior Engineer (Mechanical): Graduate in Mechanical Engineering or First Class Diploma in Mechanical Engineering + Min 5 years (Diploma) or 3 years (Degree) post qualification experience in technical problem analysis, maintenance procedures, inspections, quality control, budget planning, coordinating with multidisciplinary teams. Assistant (Finance): Bachelor Degree in Commerce with 60% marks + Min 3 years experience in processing invoices/payments, customer invoices/credit control, petty cash, Tally accounting, general ledger, bank reconciliation, financial statements, audits, TDS/GST, finance enquiries, budget support. Assistant (Administration): Bachelor Degree + Min 3 years experience in noting/drafting, computer operation, presentations, filing/scanning/copying/reports, records/databases/spreadsheets, mail/couriers/travel arrangements.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application and eligibility Interview (Offline or Online)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Nalanda University Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15th May 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Non-Teaching Positions at Nalanda University?
faq.answer: Nalanda University is recruiting for a total of 9 Non-Teaching Positions. These vacancies are spread across various departments and roles within the university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these positions?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is via email. Candidates need to prepare their application and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for Nalanda University Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these positions. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant (Finance) post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant (Finance) post, a Bachelor Degree in Commerce with at least 60% marks is required, along with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Nalanda University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their application and eligibility, followed by an interview which can be conducted offline or online.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Non-Teaching Positions at Nalanda University is contract-based.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum experience required for a Junior Engineer (Mechanical) post?
faq.answer: For a Junior Engineer (Mechanical) post, a Graduate in Mechanical Engineering needs at least 3 years of post-qualification experience, while a Diploma holder needs a minimum of 5 years of experience.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from any state apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are located in Rajgir, Bihar. While the notification does not explicitly restrict applications based on state, candidates should be willing to relocate if selected.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is needed for the Manager (IT) position?
faq.answer: The Manager (IT) position requires 8 years of experience in managing large Data Centers, Campus-wide Networks, data security, enterprise infrastructure, and various server and network security aspects.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Nalanda University Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15th May 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.
